title: Li Qian Mei
content:
Li Qian Mei
 is one of supporting character in 
Renegade Immortal
. She was a core disciple of the 
Heaven Breaking Sect
 located in the 
Rank 9 Region
 of the 
Cloud Sea Star System
.

Contents

1

Background

2

Story

3

History

3.1

Book Nine

3.2

Book Eleven

3.3

Book Twelve

4

Trivia

Background
[
]

She was hailed as the most talented cultivator in the Cloud Sea Star System as she was the youngest 
Nirvana Shatterer
 in its history.

Story
[
]

Her depth with 
Wang Lin
 starting from chapter 1166. It began with a beautiful meeting. Wang Lin saw a figure descend from the sky—a girl whose beauty was otherworldly, her skin like fine, flawless jade. With a calm that seemed to still the air around her, she asked him three profound questions: "What is heaven?" Three times she asked, and his answers, sincere and thoughtful, satisfied her deep curiosity. In that moment, a connection was silently woven.

Their paths continue at the grand auction on Peng Lai. Qianmei disguised, turning her hair into black, they stand side by side, her beauty receiving gaze from others. They seperated, there is a hidden mysterious request from her, if Wang Lin could send her off if that time comes. Wang Lin promised "I will". Later after battle with Wu Qing, Wang Ling found her again. They sat side by side among the powerful cultivators. As the proceedings began, a gentle breeze stirred, and a few strands of her silken hair brushed softly against Wang Lin. He caught the faint, calming fragrance unique to her—a scent like distant orchids and morning dew. In a voice barely above a whisper, she said she would soon have to leave. Without turning to look at her, his gaze fixed ahead, after some moment Wang Lin quietly said, "I will send you off."

When a beautiful painting of lake and rivers appeared on the auction block, Wang Lin placed a bid that silenced the entire hall. No one dared compete. He acquired the scroll, and for the first time since they sat, he turned to face Li Qianmei. In that moment, he truly saw her—not just as a fellow cultivator, but as a woman of devastating beauty, with tranquil eyes that could make any man's heart falter. He handed her the painting, a parting gift. She accepted it, a soft smile touching her lips. Then, to protect his standing before the others, she revealed her identity as the esteemed genius of the Heaven Breaking Sect for all to see before she departed, her blue hair flowing like a banner of quiet protection.

The encounter between Wang Lin and Li Qianmei after that is a poignant and layered moment of unspoken feelings and symbolic fate. 

After the auction, accompanied by the sound of her flute, Li Qianmei intercepts Wang Lin in the star fog, reasoning with she remember that Wang Lin promised to send her off, ostensibly to say goodbye before she departs for a potentially dangerous mission. Their conversation is tinged with a sense of finality, as she hints they may never meet again. In a gesture of care and perhaps something deeper, she attempts to fulfill her promise of giving him a third gift for answering her questions earlier. She offers him a personal and precious protective bracelet, still warm from her wrist. Wang Lin, however, perceives the weight and intimacy of such a gift. With his characteristic guarded nature and reluctance to incur emotional debt, he refuses, stating it is "too expensive" — a clear metaphor for the unspoken attachment it represents.

When Wang Lin turned to go, Li Qianmei then discards the bracelet into the endless star fog, a dramatic act of letting go. She then returns the painting Wang Lin had once given her. Wang Lin, in turn, leaves her a powerful treasure (a celestial pen with a rune) as a final protective gift, balancing their exchange while maintaining his emotional distance. Which she used later in battle inside spatial crack as an exchange so her blood can be sent to Wang Lin's statue. He then departs accompanied by the sound of her flute while then he checked the painting, now altered to show a dried-up riverbed with two fish sustaining each other—a silent, profound message of companionship in desolation and reliance. His brow frowned and a wry smile painting his lips.

The Bracelet as a Symbol of Inevitable Fate: The most striking twist of fate occurs shortly after. As Wang Lin flies through the vast, infinite, and direction-concealing star fog—a place where losing an object means it is gone forever—he unexpectedly comes across the very same jade bracelet Li Qianmei had thrown away. The probability of this happening is astronomically small, akin to finding a specific grain of sand in an ocean. This is not a coincidence within the narrative logic of xianxia; it is a powerful symbol. The bracelet, a token of her care that he refused, has literally found its way back to him. It signifies that their connection cannot be so easily severed by distance or words. It is an object of karma or fate, implying that their destinies are intertwined and will cross again despite his efforts to remain detached. Wang Lin's final act of sighing and taking the bracelet shows his tacit acceptance of this inexplicable bond, carrying a piece of that unresolved connection with him as he moves toward the expedition with Master Ashen Pine.

In chapter around 1285, the depth of her sacrifice would later be revealed in its full, heartbreaking measure. Wang Lin had a tough fight. He fell into a deep, stony slumber, a state between life and death, became a statue of old man. Li Qianmei found him. For ten long years, Li Qianmei stayed by his petrified side. She smeared her own vital blood over his statue to keep his spark alive. Season after season, she gave everything—her blood, her essence, her very vitality—until she was left pale, thin, and withering, a ghost of her former self. Wang Lin old man statue become younger by times. Even when she left to retrieve her last blood for Wang Lin, she left her vitality jades so it can fed life vitality for his statue and swords formation to protect him. Until about a month, she wasn't come back to the valley. When an old woman brought the last of her blood asked by her junior sister, Li Qianmei, Wang Lin finally back to live. The old woman who about to go, being stopped by Wang Lin and speak the truth. She revealed all Li Qianmei sacrificed. This decade-long vigil, the revelation struck him like heavenly thunder. A debt of such magnitude, written in blood and selflessness, ignited a desperate fire within him. He vowed to save her, no matter the cost.

His journey to find her was a path of sheer carnage and unwavering will. He tore through hordes of fierce beasts in a nightmarish spatial crack, his power erupting with each step. When he finally found her, he used his might to brighten the oppressive purple sky. In that illuminated hell, the moment the world lit up, Wang Lin saw a scene he could never forget in this life.

This scene made his mind tremble, and he let out a heaven-shaking roar that could collapse the world. His body trembled and an extreme madness erupted.

He saw her in white with a pale face smile gently at him while being surrounded by countless fierce beasts tens of thousands of feet away.

That sight, her serene face amidst the ravenous horde, drove him into a frenzy of protective madness. With a speed that defied space, he shattered the killing whip aimed at her, arriving in the nick of time to stand as an unbreakable shield before her.

She was satisfied and could now die. She just wanted to see Wang Lin, to see that he was fine. Him awakening was enough for her.

She was very tired and very cold. It seemed these 10 years had consumed her everything, and at this moment, all of that erupted, and it was going to drown her.

"Thank you.." is the last word she uttered before closing her eyes. "Don't die! You can't die!" He held her fragile, nearly lifeless form in his arms. To keep her from fading, he never stop giving his life vitality. To get out from that place, he unleashed the full, sealed extent of his cultivation, reaching the strongest state of his 2,000 years. Cradling her, he fought a legendary battle through waves of enemies, a lone figure against an endless tide, all to bring her to safety. His destination was her father, the formidable Dao Master Blue Dream.

After delivering her, Wang Lin, though injured and weary, undertook a grueling climb up the immense, pressure-filled Blue Mountain. He pushed against a force that sought to crush him, step by agonizing step, driven by a single need: to see with his own eyes that she had awakened. But when he reached the summit and found her, the victory was bittersweet. She looked at him with clear, beautiful eyes, but they held no recognition. "My name is Blue Moon(Lan Yue)," she said. "Who are you?" She had lost all memory of him, of their story, of her sacrifice.

Heartbroken, Wang Lin descended, believing their tale had ended in silent farewell. Yet, fate—or his own heart—would not allow it. Her father appear on his sight again.

Later after some time, when they met again and she, memory restored but heart aching, tried to get back the 'Forget Each Other in the World' painting as a symbol of want to let go of her own feelings, Wang Lin could not bear it. As she took the scroll, her hands holding the painting suddenly stopped because Wang Lin gripped the painting tightly.

Wang Lin closed his eyes, and the painting he held didn’t move at all as Li Qianmei pulled. Her face became even more pale as she looked at Wang Lin and saw him open his eyes.

“You don’t need this painting anymore.” Wang Lin squeezed and the 'Forgot each other in the world' painting collapsed and turned to dust. It disappeared from his hands, her hands.

Wang Lin looked at Li Qianmei. His words were filled with determination as he gently said, “From now on, you are my woman”

“Wan Er is my wife. When she awakens, let us get married together…”

Li Qianmei was startled, and after a long time, tears flowed. She began crying in Wang Lin’s arms.

Wang Lin hugged Li Qianmei. Since he had made this decision, he wouldn’t regret it. This was the first woman he had accepted in more than 2,000 years aside from Li Muwan. Her name was Li Qianmei.

“Brother, I have three questions to ask. Can you help me answer them…”

“When I leave, will you send me off…”

“If one day I die, will you still remember me…”

“Wang Lin, I can’t hold on much longer. All my blood has dried up. Will you awaken soon… I don’t regret it.”

“Wang Lin, you have to wait for me, wait for me to bring back the medicine. You will definitely wake up…”

Memories are like water in your palm. Although the water will flow away, the palm will remember the temperature of the water. Then, when the palm holds the water again, the palm will remember, and the water will also remember the warmth of the palm.

Even afterwards, when she reincarnated and tried to hide her aura. Wang Lin noticed she wants to blessing him silently from afar, Wang Lin never stopped searching. He scoured continents, his divine sense reaching out again and again, only to find absence. He looked to the heavens and laughed a bitter, mocking laugh, feeling as though the cosmos itself was playing a cruel joke, giving him one love only to take away another.

In the final, quiet moments of their long story, she stood alone in the dusk of Blackstone City. She watched as Wang Lin, reunited with Li Muwan, flew away into the sunset. Believing herself finally forgotten, she whispered a farewell to their past life as a bird and a fish, her tears melting unseen into the waters of this new world. It was then, in that moment of resigned release, that a soft, familiar voice spoke behind her, offering a gentle correction to her metaphor.

He had found her. Again.

History
[
]

Book Nine
[
]

Li Qian Mei was first introduced asking a powerful Cultivator 3 questions, all of them being "what is Dao". She liked his answers and then accompanied him to the Origin Sect. There she met 
Wang Lin
 and then asked him those same three questions related to Dao; his answer satisfied her the most. In return, she gave him a rank 10 healing pill and a semi-complete pill infused with a rank 10 beast soul.

After this she accompanied Wang Lin to 
Peng Lai
's 
Treasured Jade Sect
's auction. She left soon after the auction ended as she was called back by her sect to the Rank 9 Region, but she left Wang Lin her jade bracelet that served as a protection treasure. In return, Wang Lin gave her his Golden Celestial Brush. She was then dispatched to the 
Demon Sect
.

Afterwards, when Wang Lin was being suppressed by her father 
Dao Master Blue Dream
 in the 
Seven-Colored Realm
, he recognized this bracelet which prompted him to spare Wang Lin's life.

100 years later, she left the Demon Sect to go to the 
Everlasting Sect
 where she hoped to meet Wang Lin present with the 
Origin Sect
. She was surprised to see his unbelievable growth in strength but was more delighted to see him.

While 
Daoist Water
 and Wang Lin battled, she was under house arrest in her sect. Initially, she didn't understand why until she felt that it may be related to Wang Lin. She went as far as breaking her ties with her sect and her master to be allowed to leave the sect. Tearfully and heartbroken, she rushed to the 
Rank 5 Region
. There, she found a petrified Wang Lin and was informed by 
Wind Celestial Realm
 Master to continuously cover his body with her blood if she wished for him to awaken. She did so for over a decade while Wang Lin was in the 
Dao Realm
 with the 
Lord of the Sealed Realm
. This continuous expense on her vitality resulted in her lifespan shrinking down tremendously and her cultivation becoming extremely weak. Still, she entered the dangerous vortex filled with beasts just so she may take back her life blood that she gave to the Demon Sect and that someone may take that life blood to Wang Lin.

After Wang Lin awoke, he felt very grateful and even more guilty. He rushed to the vortex near Demon Sect to save her. Inside, he encountered 
Fan Shanlu's
 avatar and made a deal to help her if she allowed him to quickly exit the vortex.

After leaving the vortex, Wang Lin rushed to the 
Outer Realm's

Blue Silk Clan
 so that Dao Master Blue Dream may save Li Qian Mei. While saving her, Dao Master Blue Dream erased all her memories related to Wang Lin so that she would not have to pine for someone who's heart belonged to someone else.

Book Eleven
[
]

She is heartbroken by the fact that her father is forced to help the 
Outer Realm
 invade the 
Sealed Realm
 as his wife's soul is being held hostage. 

After the end of the war, while Wang Lin was guarding the Unnamed Wheel Formation, Dao Master Blue Dream appeared with Li Qian Mei to meet Wang Lin and propose that Wang Lin take his daughter as his wife and hand over 
Fifth Concubine
 who had possessed his own wife's body. In exchange, he vows to become Wang Lin's ally against 
Seven-Colored Daoist
 and 
Old Ghost Zhan
. Although he remains loyal to his 
Li Muwan
, Wang Lin finally decides to take Li Qian Mei as his wife and marry her after he revives Li Muwan.

Li Qian Mei chooses to reincarnate in the 
Immortal Astral Continent
 after mulling over the matter for a long time as her father chose to stay back in the Cave.

Book Twelve
[
]

She notices Wang Lin and Li Muwan depart the Ancient Clan after they reunite after he finally resurrects her. She sheds tears as she believes she has understood Wang Lin's choice and decides to sever her ties and forget all memories of him. However, she suddenly hears a soft voice call out to her and turns to see a familiar figure standing behind her with a smile on his face.

Trivia
[
]

She appears to have a rivalry with Mu Bingmei over their places in Wang Lin's heart, with both lamenting that Li Muwan already occupies said place. As of the end of the Sealed and Outer Realm war, Bingmei is regarded by Wang Lin as the mother of his child, Qianmei as his "woman" and Li Muwan his wife.

The figure who calls out to her at the end of the novel is heavily implied to be  one of Wang Lin's clones .

She is the only Cave World cultivator to have reincarnated as a member of the Ancient Clan, as the rest of those who were brought to the Immortal Astral Continent were reborn within the Celestial Clan.
